nodes.name: 珠鳶
nodes.summary: 珠鳶（Pearl kite，学名 Gampsonyx swainsonii），常见栖息地包括稀树草原。

nodes.name: 稀树草原
nodes.summary: 东非常见的开放草地与湿地边缘复合景观。

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: swainsonii - Vigors, 1825 | range_map = Gampsonyx swainsonii map.svg }} The pearl kite (Gampsonyx swainsonii) is a very small raptor found in open savanna habitat adjacent to deciduous woodland in Central and South America
